_comment: Copy to benefactor.json (next to the disks) to tune. Precedence: env var (BENEFACTOR_<KEY>) > REPL `cfg` > this file > default. The in-game pause menu (ESC -> OPTIONS) edits this file in place.
_comment0: Modern controls (X = interact/pickup, X+Down = drop, Jump as its own button, FIRE no longer interacts), PER DEVICE. OFF by default = authentic Amiga scheme (FIRE does pickup/interact/drop-with-Down, Up = jump). The legacy single 'modern_controls' key is the default for both per-device flags. interact_extend is INDEPENDENT of this.
_comment1: Extra HORIZONTAL reach (px) for pickup + interaction, on top of vanilla (vertical unchanged). Independent of modern controls — applies in BOTH schemes (vanilla extends Fire's reach; modern moves it to X). 0 = exact original reach. The OPTIONS menu toggle uses 5.
_comment2: Widescreen preset: disabled | 16:9 | ultrawide (21:9) | auto (follows the window aspect). Overrides the legacy 'widescreen' pixel-width knob.
_comment4: Keyboard bindings. Each value is a comma-separated list of CHORDS; a chord is keys joined by '+'. Names: Up/Down/Left/Right, Space, Return, LShift/RShift, LCtrl/Ctrl/RCtrl, Tab, single letters/digits, or any SDL key name. Omit any line to keep the default shown. (bind_hop = the modern-scheme JUMP button.)
_comment5: Controller bindings (hot-pluggable; Start pauses). Names: A/B/X/Y, DPUp/DPDown/DPLeft/DPRight, Start/Back, LB/RB, LeftTrigger/RightTrigger, LStick/RStick, and stick directions LeftX-/LeftX+/LeftY-/LeftY+ (RightX/RightY likewise). pad_hop = the modern-scheme JUMP button; pad_fire avoids A so jump never long-jumps.
